page.body:
XFBEGIN
XFREQEDITFIELD(Nazwa,40,sposdost_strNazwa) QXR_INT_FIELD(Termin,-1,5,sposdost_nCzasDostawy,1) QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXR_SEPARATOR_DARK(FORM_SPAN, Ustawienia widoczności)
Publiczny
QXE_CHECK1_FIELD_NO_BRDR(-1,,sposdost_cPublic)
QXR_SEPARATOR_DARK(FORM_SPAN,) #endif
XFEND
